title: AES Maximo机器人安装100兆瓦太阳能容量
summary: Maximo, a robotics startup incubated by energy company AES, has successfully deployed its solar panel installation robots at a site in California. The post AES Maximo robot installs 100 megawatts of solar capacity appeared first on The Robot Report .（原题：AES Maximo robot installs 100 megawatts of solar capacity）
